Shield Team","custom:security-contact":"security@quantumshield.io","custom:version":"1.0.0","details":"Complete STARK proof verification with optimized field operations  ## Overview This contract implements the on-chain verification component of the  Quantum Shield ZK-STARK proof system. It verifies proofs generated  by the off-chain STARK prover.  ## CP-1 Compliance (Quantum Resistance) - Uses ONLY SHA3-256 (FIPS 202) for all hash operations - keccak256 is PROHIBITED - Goldilocks field (2^64 - 2^32 + 1) for arithmetic - 128-bit security level  ## Version 1.0 Features (Week 11) - OptimizedField integration (modExp precompile, EEA inverse) - ProofCompressor/Decoder integration for efficient proof handling - Complete verify() function with all validation stages - BatchVerifier integration support - Gas-optimized field operations  ## Gas Optimizations | Operation      | v0.2 Gas  | v1.0 Gas  | Improvement | |---------------|-----------|-----------|-------------| | modExp        | ~5,000    | ~787      | 84%         | | modInverse    | ~10,000   | ~1,969    | 80%         | | batchMulMod   | ~50,000   | ~1,487    | 97%         | ","kind":"dev","methods":{"computeDomainElement(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"domainSize":"Size of the domain","index":"Index in the
